query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A person with light hair and glasses wearing a dark textured coat is photographed from below against a solid black background. They grip a metal post supporting a lit hexagonal lantern with one hand while extending the other hand toward the camera with fingers splayed. Red fabric drapes along both sides of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with light hair and glasses wearing a dark textured coat is photographed from a steeply tilted low angle with harsh direct flash against a solid black background. They display a distressed expression with wide eyes and an open mouth, gripping a metal post supporting a lit hexagonal lantern with one hand while clawing toward the camera with the other. Red fabric drapes along both sides of the frame, creating an atmosphere of unease and theatrical dread.
